argument: First, verify Stripe Atlas auto-filing status for 83(b). The EIN triggers immediate downstream actions — but 230 AZN was already lost in April to a duplicate 83(b) DHL submission because we assumed Stripe Atlas didn't handle it. Now we have the EIN, the risk of repeat error is 100%. Without confirmation, any tax or banking step could compound compliance fragility. Check Stripe Atlas dashboard or API: did they file? If yes, do nothing. If no, file immediately — but only after confirmation. Second, align franchise tax calendar with Delaware deadline (March 1, 2027). Third, activate Mercury via API using EIN — but gate on first two. Moving before confirmation risks financial and legal debt — both irreversible.
strongest_counter: Some argue bank setup is urgent for operations — but operations without tax compliance risk entity invalidation. Speed here is false progress.
evidence_cited: Class 19 lesson — 'Assume-nothing about incorporation services'; docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md Law 1 (accuracy over action); memory/atlas/lessons.md on financial debt propagation
